title: Smoky Dolmades Stuffed with Cabbage
description: A twist on traditional dolmades, these are stuffed with a delicious smoky cabbage filling. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the shredded cabbage and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped dolmades, smoky paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the pan. Stir to combine.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Garnish with additional dolmades or a sprinkle of paprika, if desired.
